allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "which bwrap 2>/dev/null && echo 'bwrap OK' || echo 'bwrap NOT found'; which socat 2>/dev/null && echo 'socat OK' || echo 'socat NOT found'; which claude 2>/dev/null && echo 'claude OK' || echo 'claude NOT found'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y bubblewrap socat 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "node --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'node NOT found'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "which bwrap && which socat && echo 'Both installed'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- sudo apt-get install -y bubblewrap socat)
PowerShell(if \($?\) { "passwordless sudo: OK" } else { "sudo requires password" })
